This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Netflix Stock Is the Big Winner in Warner Takeover Battle. CEO Puts Shareholders Over Ego. - Barron's
item.description:
1. Netflix Stock Is the Big Winner in Warner Takeover Battle. CEO Puts Shareholders Over Ego.  Barron's

item.title: Fintech company Block lays off 4,000 of its 10,000 staff, citing gains from AI - AP News
item.description:
1. Fintech company Block lays off 4,000 of its 10,000 staff, citing gains from AI  AP News

  4. Dorsey's radical workforce reset may embolden CEOs  Axios
  5. Block laying off 40 percent of staff, citing AI advancements  The Hill

item.title: Dow tumbles 500 points after hot inflation report, mounting concerns about AI impact: Live updates - CNBC
item.description:

item.title: US moves to cut off a Swiss bank over alleged Iran and Russia money flows - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Young woman says she was on social media 'all day long' as a child in landmark addiction trial - AP News
item.description:

item.title: US Department of Labor proposes rule clarifying employee, independent contractor status under federal wage and hour laws - U.S. Department of Labor (.gov)
item.description:

item.title: Smartphone sales could be in for their biggest drop ever - The Verge
item.description:
